name_en: Burberry TB Small Exclusive Logo Leather Lock Bag, structured leather shoulder bag with smooth texture, featuring a lock decoration inspired by the Thomas exclusive logo. Easily transforms into a crossbody or handbag style. Dimensions: W21 x H16 x D6cm Removable and adjustable leather crossbody strap 1 external slip pocket; 1 zippered interior pocket 2 interior compartments Top flap with lock design Hand-painted edges Glossy metal hardware Made in Italy
